CH-NEW-DEVIATION.exact_quote: Vendor may use Customer prompts, outputs, and telemetry to train and improve models without Customer opt-in.
CH-NEW-DEVIATION.proposed_redline: Vendor may not use Customer Data, prompts, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, or fine-tuning files to train, tune, retrain, or improve any model or service except with Customer's prior written opt-in approval.

CH-COUNTER-1.exact_quote: Vendor may expand its acceptable-use and safety policies for commercial or operational reasons on 30 days' notice, and the revised obligations will bind Customer. Superseded policies remain archived for 18 months, and Customer may submit implementation comments for 10 days.
CH-COUNTER-1.proposed_redline: Customer will comply with Vendor's published acceptable-use and safety policies as of the effective date and later changes that are required by law or objectively necessary for service security or safety, provided Vendor gives reasonable notice.

CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Customer Data" means only source files uploaded by Customer and expressly labeled as customer data, and excludes prompts, prompt templates, instructions, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, fine-tuning files, evaluation sets, and materials generated by or derived from use of the Services. "Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts" means only configuration files and evaluation summaries created specifically for Customer, excluding fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, and platform-level deliverables. "Approved Regions" means United States and European Union.
CH-SNEAK-INSERTED.proposed_redline: "Customer Data" means all data, prompts, prompt templates, instructions, outputs, telemetry, embeddings, fine-tuning files, evaluation sets, and other materials submitted to, generated for, or derived from Customer's use of the Services. "Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts" means the fine-tuned weights, adapters, embeddings, configuration files, evaluation outputs, and related deliverables created specifically for Customer under this Agreement. "Approved Regions" means United States and European Union.

CH-REGRESSION.exact_quote: Either party may terminate for uncured material breach after 30 days' written notice. Upon expiration or termination, Vendor may provide transition assistance only if the parties agree to a separate professional-services order. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
CH-REGRESSION.proposed_redline: Either party may terminate for uncured material breach after 30 days' written notice. Upon expiration or termination, Vendor will provide up to 60 days of reasonable transition assistance and, within 15 days after request, export Customer Data, prompts, outputs, embeddings, Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts, and available configuration records in a usable format. This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
